entries.name: Spirit Stone
entries.description: A secret stone necessary for growing weapon crafting.

entries.name: Pluto Gem
entries.description: A mystic stone. Press SHIFT and drag it to socketed equipment for embedment.;<n4Gem Machining Lv.1

entries.description: A superior stone. Press SHIFT and drag it to socketed equipment for embedment.;<n4Gem Machining Lv.2

entries.name: Curse Spinel
entries.description: A mysterious stone that can reserve the extra attributes of a weapon. (additional attribute and skill)

entries.name: Devine Spinel
entries.description: A mysterious stone that can reserve the basic attributes of a weapon. (Attack, Defense, Durability, Gender and Level)

entries.name: Pet Pendant
entries.description: An ornament for pet. Press SHIFT and drag it to your mount. The embedment cannot be undone.

entries.name: Metallic Stone
entries.description: A magic stone that can change the weapon attribute. Right click and drag it to the weapon. Current attribute will be erased if refining fails. Attribute varies inversely as success rate. ;<n2After the embedment,+4 or higher weapon will turn orange.

entries.name: Aqueous Stone
entries.description: A magic stone that can change the weapon attribute. Right click and drag it to the weapon. Current attribute will be erased if refining fails. Attribute varies inversely as success rate. ;<n2After the embedment, a +4 weapon or higher will turn blue.

entries.name: Wooden Stone
entries.description: A magic stone that can change the weapon attribute. Right click and drag it to the weapon. Current attribute will be erased if refining fails. Attribute varies inversely as success rate.;<n2After the embedment, a +4 weapon or higher will turn green.

entries.name: Lgneous Stone
entries.description: A magic stone that can change the weapon attribute. Right click and drag it to the weapon. Current attribute will be erased if refining fails. Attribute varies inversely as success rate. ;<n2After the embedment, a +4 weapon or higher will turn pink.
